title: sagus elata
intro: Sagus elata, also known as the Chinese white pine or Korean fir, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Sagus elata include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant compounds found in its bark, needles, and cones. The health benefits of this plant include relieving coughs, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential in lowering cholesterol levels and improving cardiovascular health. Traditionally, Sagus elata has been used in herbal preparations, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
